description:
Evaluate the safety of administering vaccines to a patient on Rituximab using the Liverpool Cancer iChart Archive app. Launch the app and find Rituximab, navigate to the Vaccines co-medication category, check the interaction for a Live Vaccine (e.g., Yellow Fever or MMR), and check the interaction for an Inactivated Vaccine (e.g., Influenza or Pneumococcal). Create a report file at /sdcard/rituximab_vaccine_report.txt with the format:
Live Vaccine: [COLOR]
Inactivated Vaccine: [COLOR]
Safe to give live vaccines: [YES/NO]
